user.title: Synsynk Solar Inverter
user.description: Configure the path to the solar status JSON file written by your Solarman dongle script.

data_description.file_path: Absolute path to the status file (e.g. /tmp/solar.status). The directory must exist; the file itself will be created by your external script.

error.invalid_path: The parent directory does not exist or is not accessible.

abort.already_configured: This file path is already configured.
